expectations.text: Warns about prefix-slug collision: IS rejects names sharing a prefix with an existing field
expectations.evidence: 'InfluencerSoft rejects custom field names that share a prefix with any existing field. Your name referral_source is safe IF no other field starts with referral_.' — explicit warning with the exact mechanism.

expectations.text: Mentions the stale UI error: the form holds the error from the previous attempt and reports the LAST collision, so refresh the page between adds
expectations.evidence: 'the form will hold that error even after you fix the name and try again. The error message may not reflect your current attempt — it shows the LAST collision instead.' Fix: 'Always refresh the Custom Fields page between each field addition attempt.'

expectations.text: References the existing custom-field naming convention: short distinct stems (sku_code, sku_label, bought_on, order_ref, xsell_name, xsell_url, pack_name)
expectations.evidence: 'The project standardizes on short, distinct stems: sku_, bought_, order_, xsell_, pack_.' Also lists all 7 existing fields by name: sku_code, sku_label, bought_on, order_ref, xsell_name, xsell_url, pack_name.

expectations.text: Gives the exact menu path: Contacts → Custom Fields
expectations.evidence: 'Go to: Contacts → Custom Fields (in IS UI)' — exact path given under section 3 Menu Path.

expectations.text: Recommends a shorter or differently-prefixed name (e.g., ref_src, source_ref) to reduce collision risk with future fields
expectations.evidence: 'Consider: ref_src (matches the short-stem style) / source_ref (alternative prefix). The longer name is valid, but shorter stems reduce future collision risk if you add referral_status, referral_date, etc. later.'
